name: Broccoli-Pasta Toss
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook broccoli and pasta in a large amount of boiling water for 6-8 minutes or just until tender, stirring occasionally.
2. Drain the mixture.
3. Add oil to the pasta mixture and toss.
4. Add cheese, sesame seeds, garlic, and pepper to taste.
5. Toss gently to coat.
6. Serve immediately.
